src/test/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.general_idea: Activate the 'test' Spring profile to ensure test-specific configuration is loaded during test execution.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent to 2.6.2 to support Java 17 features and security patches.
Configure the project to compile and run using Java 17.
Increment the project artifact version to 1.1.0.
Add Spring Cloud Gateway MVC dependency for routing capabilities.
Add spring-dotenv dependency to load environment variables from .env files.
Add Lombok dependency to reduce boilerplate code in Java classes.
Add Springfox Boot Starter for API documentation generation.
Add Springfox Swagger UI dependency to serve the API documentation interface.
Add JaCoCo Maven plugin to generate code coverage reports.
Define development profile properties to activate the 'development' Spring profile by default.
Define production profile properties to activate the 'production' Spring profile when env.PRODUCTION is set.
Add frontend-maven-plugin to build the React frontend during the Maven build process.
Add maven-antrun-plugin to copy built frontend assets to the backend output directory.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add patterns to ignore temporary files generated by Emacs editor.
Add patterns to ignore temporary directories and reports generated by Stryker mutation testing tool.
Add pattern to ignore the static output directory of Storybook builds.
Add pattern to ignore package-lock.json at the root level while explicitly keeping the one in the frontend directory.
Add pattern to ignore local environment configuration files containing sensitive data.

dev_environment.general_idea: Expose port 6006 in the development container to support Storybook or similar UI development tools.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Add Maven resource filtering placeholder for active Spring profiles to support environment-specific configuration.
Disable the Open Session in View pattern to prevent lazy loading issues and improve performance, a common best practice in modern Spring Boot applications.
Configure Google OAuth2 client ID using environment variables with fallback to .env file and default value.
Configure Google OAuth2 client secret using environment variables with fallback to .env file and default value.
Define the OAuth2 scopes requested from Google as email and profile.
Expose the mappings endpoint in Spring Boot Actuator for debugging and monitoring purposes.
Set the base path for Swagger v2 documentation.
Set Hibernate DDL auto mode to update to automatically adjust the database schema based on entity changes.
Define a custom property for admin emails sourced from environment variables with a default fallback.

Explicitly set the path matching strategy to ANT_PATH_MATCHER to maintain compatibility with older Spring MVC behavior or specific routing requirements, often necessary when migrating between Spring Boot versions where default strategies might change.
